import React from 'react'; import { ChevronLeft, FileText, Download, Shield } from 'lucide-react'; /** * LoanTermsScreen Component * Detailed disclosure of terms, interest rates, and legalities. */ const LoanTermsScreen = ({ onBack }) => { return (
{/* Header */}

Legal Disclosure

{/* Content */}
{/* Icon at top */}
{/* Sections */}

1. Eligibility

Loans are available to active Nest users with a minimum of 6 months transaction history and a credit score above 600.

2. Interest Rates

Standard interest rates range from 5% to 15% APR depending on creditworthiness. Rates are fixed for the duration of the loan.

3. Repayment

Repayments are automatically deducted from your main wallet on the 1st of every month. Ensure sufficient funds are available to avoid penalties.

{/* Security Note */}

Nest is a regulated financial entity. Your data is protected with 256-bit encryption.

); }; export default LoanTermsScreen;
